message.content:
@startuml
participant LoaderPlugin as L1
participant ContentServer as CS
participant FS as FS

L1 --> CS : LoadBundleIndexes()

loop [for each index file]
    CS --> FS : ReadFile()
    FS --> CS : parse ContentBundleIndex instances, fill mountpoint mappings
    CS --> CS : loop
end

CS --> L1 : Done
@enduml
